title: altingia chinensis
intro: Altingia chinensis, also known as Chinese silver apricot or Chinese altingia, is a plant species in the family Hamamelidaceae, native to China and Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Altingia chinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting immune function. Altingia chinensis is typically prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea in traditional herbal medicine, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
